tool.name: reverse_shell_generator
tool.description: Generate reverse shell payloads for various languages and platforms.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Generate bash/sh reverse shells - Create PowerShell reverse shells - Generate Python/Perl/Ruby/PHP shells - Create encoded payloads to bypass filters - Generate bind shells as alternatives - Create web shells for file upload

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The generation action to perform: - generate_bash: Generate Bash reverse shell - generate_powershell: Generate PowerShell reverse shell - generate_python: Generate Python reverse shell - generate_php: Generate PHP reverse shell - generate_perl: Generate Perl reverse shell - generate_ruby: Generate Ruby reverse shell - generate_nc: Generate Netcat reverse shell - generate_all: Generate all reverse shell types - generate_web_shell: Generate web shells - generate_msfvenom: Generate msfvenom commands

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: Encoding type: base64, url, none (default: none)

tool.examples:
# Generate bash reverse shell
generate_bash 10.10.14.1 4444
# Generate all shells with base64 encoding
generate_all 10.10.14.1 9001 base64
# Generate msfvenom commands
generate_msfvenom 192.168.1.100 443
